Term.Name: App for service when available
Term.Definition: An associated application that is intended to be started during the availability period of a service instance

Term.Name: App with media in parallel
Term.Definition: An associated application to be started in parallel with commencing presentation of any A/V media

Term.Name: App controlling media presentation
Term.Definition: An associated application that controls media presentation or has no media

Term.Name: App in series with media presentation
Term.Definition: An associated application that is to be run before media presentation starts

Term.Name: App for outside availability period
Term.Definition: An associated application to be started outside the availability period of a service instance

Term.Name: A service provider's home page
Term.Definition: Run a service provider's home page as a linked application, e.g. from the DVB-I content guide or a UI giving a list of available services (perhaps without guide data).

Term.Name: An application associated with a whole service list
Term.Definition: An associated application to be started in connection with actions related to a whole service list.

Term.Name: App during service list installation
Term.Definition: An application associated with a whole service list to be run during the process of selecting (installing) that service list, e.g. immediately before or after region selection as defined in clause 5.6.3.

Term.Name: Withdrawal of agreement
Term.Definition: An application associated with a whole service list to be run if the user indicates that they withdraw agreement or consent given when the service list was selected.

Term.Name: Renew agreement
Term.Definition: An application associated with a whole service list to be run if the user needs To renew agreement or consent given when the service list was selected, e.g. due to significant changes.
